programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's South is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the North - football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the '50s, including LSU with star running back Billy Cannon in 1958, prior to Cannon's epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss a year later.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: In the 1960s, as Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the Civil Rights Movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region, Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama - and SEC football.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change, with expansion and the sport's first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and QB Peyton Manning.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: Nick Saban comes to LSU in 2000 and eventually wins the Tigers' first national championship since 1958 - a feat matched by Les Miles. At Florida, Tim Tebow becomes a cult hero and wins two national titles with Urban Meyer's Gators.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football

programme.desc: Unique endures a painful recovery fueled by hate and vengeance as other untold narratives unfold around him, filling the gaps leading up to the deadly showdown in the season three finale.

programme.desc: Kanan and Raq navigate a new business relationship just as Unique begins to plot his quest for revenge; Lou considers a new music opportunity; Marvin goes too far on a side-job for Stefano; Juke tries to adjust to life in the Army.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq and Marvin face the aftermath of Unique's violent, clandestine comeback; Lou manages his new artist; Kanan gets through to his grandmother; Juke embraces her sexuality.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Unique forms an unlikely alliance in his vendetta against Raq while she inches closer to a new drug enterprise; Kanan takes advice from Snaps and Pop, and Jukebox's new friendship leads to a violent encounter.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq and Marvin navigate a dwindling supply of product, while Lou and Imani scout artists together; Joyce's condition worsens; Famous's mother desperately tries to find him.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq tries to overcome Marvin's poor judgment; Kanan recruits Jukebox to help him to get justice for his friend; Unique assembles the final pieces of his plan.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Unique and his soldiers assume control of the corners in Queens, leaving Raq and Marvin in desperate need of more answers and more product; Kanan searches for a missing O-Cee.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq goes on the offensive as Marvin and Lou attempt to contain the escalating situations; Jukebox joins the search for O-Cee, while Kanan looks into his theory on what happened to Famous.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Kanan investigates Krystal's disappearance; Raq faces fallout from Unique's retaliation and Marvin's mistake; Jukebox revisits her past; Lou embraces his new path.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: A devastated Kanan furiously searches for answers and revenge; Raq attempts to stave off the collapse of her business as she and Lou prepare for a possible war with Unique.
